delivery_summary.description: Settings Pages Wiring — wired team and integrations pages to real tRPC queries. Notifications (redirect) and account (AccountSettingsContent) pages were already fully wired and required no changes.

AC-1-team-real-data.evidence: Replaced const teamMembers=[...] with trpc.user.list.useQuery({ limit: 50 }). Loading skeleton, error state with Retry, EmptyState icon/title/description for zero users (no entity= to avoid wrong agents copy).

AC-2-integrations-real-connector-health.evidence: Replaced const integrations=[...] with trpc.integrations.getAllConnectorsHealth.useQuery(). healthy|degraded|unhealthy=Connected (unhealthy=configured but failed), unknown=Available (not configured). Latency badge. Toast 'coming soon' for Disconnect/Connect. No console.info stubs.

AC-3-tests.evidence: 6 team tests + 8 integrations tests in src/app/settings/*/--tests--/. team: 100% line coverage. integrations: 100% statements/lines, 86% branches (above 80% gate). 633 total test files, 11227 tests all pass.

AC-4-no-regressions.evidence: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web typecheck: PASS. pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test --run: 633 files, 11227 tests, 0 failures. pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web lint: PASS. pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build: PASS (Compiled successfully in 39.9s).

coverage_integrations.result: PASS (100% statements, 86.48% branches, 87.5% functions, 100% lines — above 80% gate)

all_settings_functional.target: All 4 settings pages load real data
all_settings_functional.actual: team+integrations: wired to tRPC. notifications: redirect to fully-wired /notifications/settings. account: delegates to fully-wired AccountSettingsContent. 0 hardcoded arrays remain.

spec_session_consensus: UNANIMOUS — 2 pages (notifications/account) already wired, 2 pages need wiring (team/integrations). Delta-only approach.
notes: user.list does not return role field — Role column dropped from team page (was hardcoded fake data)
user.list default limit=5 — passed limit:50 to fetch full team roster
getAllConnectorsHealth uses protectedProcedure — appropriate (connector health is env-var scoped, not tenant-scoped)
status:'unknown' = env vars not configured = 'Not configured' label (honest per never-mock-data rule)
status:'unhealthy' = credentials present but health check failed = shown in Connected section with Disconnected badge
No connect/disconnect mutations exist — buttons show toast 'Integration management coming soon'
No team/users EmptyState entity exists — EmptyState used in legacy icon mode with explicit title/description
integrations: zero-connector state uses inline text (no entity= either — no integrations entity)
codex waiver: capped-roster-count (228d78ed) — user.list limit:50 cap is API gap, not page defect; label is 'Members loaded'
Material Symbols Outlined only — no lucide-react or other icon libraries
Tests colocated in src/app/settings/*/--tests--/ to satisfy vitest include glob src/**
